name: Blocklander

api_key.how_to_get: Create an API key in the Blocklander dashboard at https://app.blocklander.io.
api_key.note: Do not commit a real API key.

tip_wallets_endpoint.note: Docs recommend always using the API to fetch the latest Blocklander wallets instead of relying on hardcoded wallets.

tip_note: Add a System Program transfer of at least 500,000 lamports to a current Blocklander tip wallet.
cost_on_failure: not explicitly documented; tip is a SOL transfer instruction included in the transaction, so it is only paid if the transaction lands and executes the tip instruction

global.note: Global DNS load-balanced endpoint based on latency.

regional.note: Live site states: 'Access endpoints in strategic locations: Frankfurt, Amsterdam, New York, Hong Kong and more.' Specific regional hostnames are still surfaced via the dashboard, not published as URLs.

sendTransaction.description: RPC-like JSON-RPC sendTransaction endpoint for accelerated Solana transaction submission.
sendTransaction.unsupported_methods_note: The Blocklander URL does not support any RPC method other than sendTransaction.

ping.description: Keep-alive endpoint for maintaining warm TCP connections.

rate_limits.note: Docs publish connection keep-alive limits, but no TPS or API request rate limit.

notes: The .stack provider label BLOCKLANDER maps to Blocklander.
Docs describe Blocklander as sending transactions in parallel across multiple independent pipelines with optimized networking and geographically aware routing.
The OpenAPI link in llms.txt currently points to a Mintlify sample spec, so the implementation guide is the authoritative source for this entry.
Do not push dashboard-specific regional endpoints or API keys if they are account-private.
